hits.title: Lake Pontchartrain Causeway - Wikipedia
hits.summary: The southern terminus of the causeway is in Metairie, Louisiana, and the northern terminus is in Mandeville, Louisiana.

hits.title: Interstate 10 - Wikipedia
hits.summary: In New Orleans, a stretch of I-10 from the I-10/I-610 Junction near the Orleans–Jefferson parish line to the US 90/US 90 Business (US 90 Bus.) junction is known as the Pontchartrain Expressway.
